nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: Rufous-winged sunbird
nodes.summary: Rufous-winged sunbird（Cinnyris rufipennis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Rufous-winged sunbird。

nodes.name: Cinnyris
nodes.summary: Cinnyris（Cinnyris）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联59种鸟类，如綠腹花蜜鳥、Western miombo sunbird、Eastern miombo sunbird等59种鸟类。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: 动物界

nodes.name: 鸟纲

nodes.name: 脊索动物门
nodes.summary: 脊索动物门（Chordata）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: Rufous-winged sunbird
nodes.summary: The rufous-winged sunbird (Cinnyris rufipennis) is a species of bird in the family Nectariniidae. It is endemic to Tanzania. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. It is threatened by habitat loss. References External links BirdLife Species Factsheet.
nodes.shortSummary: The rufous-winged sunbird (Cinnyris rufipennis) is a species of bird in the family Nectariniidae. It is endemic to Tanzania.

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss
